task_completion.visual_evidence: In the user list or user details view, Julian's name is displayed as 'Julian Bautista [TEMP]'.

task_completion.visual_evidence: The credentials section for Julian Bautista shows a PIN is set (specifically '774411' if visible, or an active PIN indicator).

task_completion.description: Verify that control users were not incorrectly modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Other users visible in the user list (e.g., Priya, Derek, Marcus, Fatima) do NOT have '[TEMP]' appended to their names.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating to https://localhost:9443 rather than terminal commands (like curl) interacting with the API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual 2N Access Commander GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Visuals match the 2N Access Commander interface, not a text editor, database client, or script output.

integrity.description: Verify the changes were actually saved to the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updated names and PIN indicators are visible in the main user list or a saved state, not just typed into an unsaved edit form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target users requiring remediation (no credentials): Julian Bautista and Chloe Arnaud. Expected PIN to assign: 774411. Expected Last Name suffix: ' [TEMP]'. Control users who already have credentials and MUST NOT be modified: Priya, Derek, Marcus, Fatima.
